title: Kaboom Crew — MVP 2 (mechanic depth + bot personality + power-up variety)
summary: Second-pass polish on the MVP-1 vertical slice: mechanic depth (kick, remote-detonate), bot personality variants beyond difficulty, content variety. Driven by game-design proposals filed in S98-S99: GDP-003 (kick), GDP-005 (bot personality), GDP-006 (remote-detonate), and future power-up additions. Follows KABOOM-CREW-MVP-1.
doneCriteria: Bumping into your own bomb kicks it one cell forward (GDP-003 KABOOM-KICK-POWER-UP)
Bot personality dial (Hunter / Coward / Miner) tunable from URL (GDP-005)
Remote-detonate power-up: fuse pauses, player triggers blast (GDP-006)
At least one additional content variety landed (arena, skin, or sound bank)
notes: Decoupled from the network epic (KABOOM-CREW-MVP-NETWORK) — local solo + bot is the MVP-2 surface; multiplayer is a parallel track.
Proposals 008-010 (procedural characters / animation / voice) are tracked under the KABOOM-CREW-CHARACTERS epic, not this one.
